summary: Completed testing of Evolution PRO Lancio Vendita Model (Traffico → Landing → Webinar → Offerta → Follow-up). All backend tests pass (10/10). Frontend tests pass - all 7 tabs visible, FunnelSteps indicator working, content rendering correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/partner-journey/lancio/2 returns all required sections: landing_page, webinar, offerta, email_followup (6 items), calendario_30g, contenuti_pronti, piano_ads
landing_page has all required fields: headline, promessa, problema, benefici (array), cta_iscrizione
offerta has all required fields: nome_prodotto, prezzo_pieno, prezzo_lancio, bonus (3 items), garanzia, urgenza
email_followup is array of 6 emails with numero, timing, tipo, subject, body
webinar has obiezioni_comuni array with obiezione/risposta pairs
Frontend Hero shows 'Attiviamo il tuo lancio' and subtitle 'Traffico → Landing → Webinar → Offerta → Follow-up'
FunnelSteps indicator (data-testid='funnel-steps') shows Landing → Webinar → Offerta → Follow-up
All 7 tabs visible with correct data-testid: lancio-tab-landing, lancio-tab-webinar, lancio-tab-offerta, lancio-tab-followup, lancio-tab-calendario, lancio-tab-contenuti, lancio-tab-ads
Landing tab shows headline, promessa, problema, benefici with green check icons, CTA iscrizione
Webinar tab shows titolo, scaletta with numbered phases, obiezioni section (expandable)
Offerta tab shows prezzo_pieno (barrato), prezzo_lancio (yellow), bonus with Gift icon, garanzia, urgenza
Follow-up tab shows 6 email accordion items with timing, tipo, subject, expandable body
seed_data_creation: None - used existing partner ID 2 with pre-generated lancio plan
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lancio Vendita Model fully tested. Navigation: Admin login → Partner tab → Click 'Lancio' in right panel step list. The page shows the new sales funnel model with 7 tabs. Plan data is already generated for partner ID 2 (Arianna Aceto). Backend endpoint: GET /api/partner-journey/lancio/2 returns plan_data with all sections.

features_tested.plan_data.landing_page structure: PASS - headline, promessa, problema, benefici (4), cta_iscrizione
features_tested.plan_data.offerta structure: PASS - nome_prodotto, prezzo_pieno (€297), prezzo_lancio (€197), bonus (3), garanzia, urgenza
features_tested.plan_data.email_followup: PASS - 6 emails with numero, timing, tipo, subject, body
features_tested.plan_data.webinar.scaletta: PASS - 6 phases with momento, contenuto, obiettivo
features_tested.FunnelSteps indicator (data-testid='funn: PASS - Shows Landing → Webinar → Offerta → Follow-up
features_tested.Landing tab content: PASS - headline, promessa, problema, benefici with checks, CTA
features_tested.Follow-up tab content: PASS - 6 email accordions with timing, tipo, subject
